data.title: PenFed Credit Union Partners with InvestiFi to Bring Embedded Investing to Members
data.description: PenFed Credit Union, one of the largest in the nation, has recently announced a partnership with InvestiFi. This new agreement allows PenFed members to have direct access to comprehensive digital investing services through their mobile and online banking platforms. The collaboration, established on April 20, 2026 in Dover, Delaware, aims to provide PenFed's members with a seamless and integrated investment experience. This move enhances the credit union's offerings as it continues to prioritize innovation and convenience for its members.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Snaps Win Streak On Rising U.S.-Iran Tensions; Nvidia, Rocket Lab, Tesla Key Movers
data.description: The Nasdaq's winning streak came to an end on Monday due to increasing tensions between the U.S. and Iran, impacting Dow Jones Futures. Key players such as Nvidia, Rocket Lab, and Tesla experienced significant movement. This shift in the market highlighted the fragility of the situation, as the Nasdaq faced a setback after its continuous climb. This news was highlighted by Investor's Business Daily, emphasizing the importance of monitoring global events as they impact financial markets.

data.title: In HelloNation, In-Home Health Care Expert Shireeta Benjamin-Cosom Breaks Down Complex Home Care
data.description: In an article featured in HelloNation, Shireeta Benjamin-Cosom from We C.A.R.E. Home Health Agency in Bristol, PA delves into the complexities of home care, aiming to clarify why it is frequently misconstrued. The article enlightens readers on the intricacies of this field and sheds light on the challenges faced by professionals in the industry. Through Benjamin-Cosom's insights, readers gain a better understanding of the demanding nature of providing care in a home setting. This article serves as an informative piece for individuals seeking to comprehend the nuances of home care.

data.title: Knife River Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: Knife River Corporation (NYSE: KNF), a construction materials and contracting services company, is set to hold its Q1 2026 earnings conference call on May 5, 2026, at 11 a.m. EDT. The financial results will be disclosed before the NYSE market opens on the same day. Those interested can access a live webcast of the call and presentation slides on the Investor section of the Knife River website.
Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif may announce an extension of the ceasefire tomorrow - Al Hadath, citing media sources.

data.title: Vensure Employer Solutions Launches HR Compliance, an AI-powered platform delivering real-time compliance guidance
data.description: Today in Chandler, Arizona, Vensure Employer Solutions unveiled HR Compliance, a cutting-edge compliance platform integrated into its suite of services. Vensure is a prominent company offering HR/HCM technology, managed services, and global business process outsourcing. This new AI-powered platform aims to revolutionize compliance processes for businesses of all sizes. The launch was announced on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Are CNTA, KORE, CWAN Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders?
data.description: Those with inside knowledge may have the opportunity to gain significant financial advantages that regular shareholders do not have access to. The suggested deals might include conditions that restrict better competing bids. Shareholders are urged to reach out to the company to explore their rights and choices without incurring any expenses.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- HelloNation/
data.description: An article by HelloNation discusses the significance of property boundaries with land survey expert Scott Andersen from Menasha, Wisconsin. The news release was issued on February 17, 2026. HelloNation stated that there was an error in the headline of the release.

data.title: Shrub Oak International School Launches Innovative Teaching Kitchen to Empower Students with Real-World Life Skills
data.description: Mohegan Lake, New York - On April 20, 2026, Shrub Oak International School unveiled its new Teaching Kitchen, a specialized learning environment aimed at helping students acquire crucial skills through practical experience. This facility offers hands-on learning opportunities to its students, fostering the development of essential abilities that can be applied across various settings.

data.title: Valvoline Inc. to Report Financial Results for Second Quarter 2026 and Host Webcast on May 7
data.description: Valvoline Inc. (NYSE: VVV) has revealed that it will release its fiscal second-quarter financial results on May 7, 2026. An interactive webcast for analysts and investors is scheduled to take place at 9 a.m. ET on the same day. The webcast and accompanying slide presentation will be accessible through the Investor Relations section of Valvoline's website at http://investors.valvoline.com. Following the call, an archived version will be available.
Islamabad has asked Washington and Tehran to extend the truce for two more weeks - Al Hadath, citing Pakistani media.

data.title: FIRST UNITED CORPORATION ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: In Oakland, Maryland on April 20, 2026, First United Corporation disclosed its financial performance for the quarter ending in March. As the parent company of First United Bank & Trust, the Corporation, traded as NASDAQ: FUNC, reported key numbers for this period.

data.title: Fluence Energy, Inc. Announces Second Quarter Earnings Release Date, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Arlington, Virginia - On April 20, 2026, Fluence Energy, Inc. (Nasdaq: FLNC) revealed plans to disclose its financial results for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, post market closure.

data.title: USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend on Common Stock
data.description: Miami-based USCB Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: USCB) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.125 per share for its Class A common stock on April 20, 2026. The dividend will be payable on June 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The Board of Directors will review and approve future dividend payments on a quarterly basis.

data.title: Perella Weinberg to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and to Host Conference Call on May 1, 2026
data.description: On April 20, 2026, Perella Weinberg Partners, a prominent independent advisory firm listed on NASDAQ as PWP, shared its intention to disclose the financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 on May 1, 2026. The report is set to be revealed before the market opens, offering insights into the firm's performance during this period. This announcement signifies a crucial update for investors and stakeholders interested in the company's financial standing in the market.
